positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical cosmic tapestry design featuring interwoven constellations, stylized nebula dust, and geometric celestial bodies. The art style should mimic elegant golden etching or linocut woodblock prints, achieving maximum visual contrast and clean silhouette edges. Composition must be centered and adaptable for large-format printing. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, Prussian blue, metallic gold, and matte black. Focus on complex, repeating patterns that are aesthetically pleasing and look fantastic on fabric. Intricate line work, vector art quality, symmetrical radial composition, sacred geometry influences.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, low detail, bad anatomy, text, watermark, signature, logo, cropped, grainy, artifact, poor composition, messy edges
